items.raw_excerpt: From class sizes to special education, we've heard from countless Ontario students about the top issues affecting their classrooms. Now, with the last school year behind them and the fall less than two months away, we're asking teachers to weigh in. Join us at 2 p.m. ET Thursday when Chris Glover sits down with three GTA teachers to deep dive into hot-button issues like absenteeism, exam changes and budget cuts.
items.summary_en: Ontario teachers will discuss major classroom issues like class sizes, special education, absenteeism, and budget cuts. A live panel with three GTA teachers will examine exam changes and other hot-button topics. The conversation happens Thursday at 2 p.m. ET.
items.summary_ko: 온타리오 교사들이 학급 규모, 특수교육, 결석 문제, 예산 삭감 등 주요 교실 현안을 논의한다. 토론회에서는 GTA 지역 교사 세 명이 패널로 참여해 시험 제도 변화와 쟁점을 집중 조명한다. 이 대담은 목요일 오후 2시(ET)에 생중계된다.
items.title_en: Ontario teachers debate top issues in classrooms
items.title_ko: 온타리오 교사들이 교실 현안을 놓고 토론한다
items.title_original: WATCH LIVE | Teachers debate the biggest issues affecting Ontario schools

items.raw_excerpt: The tallest Messi monument is located in Cutral Co and is part of an open-air museum featuring Jesus, saints and dinosaurs
items.summary_en: A giant Lionel Messi statue towers over an open-air museum in Cutral Co, Patagonia. It shares the park with statues of Jesus, Catholic saints and dinosaurs. Locals call it the world's tallest tribute to the soccer star.
items.summary_ko: 파타고니아 쿠트랄코에 있는 야외 박물관에 리오넬 메시의 거대한 동상이 세워졌다. 이 동상은 예수, 가톨릭 성인, 공룡 조형물과 함께 전시되어 있다. 지역 주민들은 이 동상이 세계에서 가장 높은 메시 기념비라고 말한다.
items.title_en: World's tallest Messi statue stands beside Jesus, saints and dinosaurs in Patagonia museum
items.title_ko: 파타고니아에 예수·성인·공룡과 나란히 선 가장 큰 메시 동상
items.title_original: The story behind Lionel Messi’s viral statue in Patagonia

items.raw_excerpt: A leopard rescued from a snare in Nilgiris was treated and released into Mudumalai Tiger Reserve by the Forest Department.
items.summary_en: A leopard was trapped in a snare set for wild game in the Nilgiris. The Forest Department treated its injuries and released it into the Mudumalai Tiger Reserve.
items.summary_ko: 닐기리 지역에서 야생 동물 사냥용 올무에 걸린 표범이 산림청에 의해 구조됐습니다. 치료를 받은 뒤 무두말라이 호랑이 보호구역으로 방생됐습니다.
items.title_en: Leopard rescued from snare, released into tiger reserve
items.title_ko: 올무에 걸린 표범 구조돼 호랑이 보호구역으로 방생
items.title_original: Leopard trapped in snare laid for wild game rescued, released into tiger reserve

items.raw_excerpt: They've made admirers out of music's biggest names over their 15-year career, but this Australian group are always thinking about the future.
items.summary_en: The Australian band has earned admirers from music's biggest names over 15 years. They are always thinking about the future.
items.summary_ko: 호주 출신 밴드 Hiatus Kaiyote가 15년간 비욘세와 드레이크 등 최정상급 뮤지션들의 팬심을 얻었다. 하지만 이들은 여전히 미래를 바라보며 음악을 만들고 있다.
items.title_en: Hiatus Kaiyote marks 15 years with Beyoncé and Drake as fans
items.title_ko: 비욘세도 인정한 Hiatus Kaiyote, 15년째 이어온 A급 팬들
items.title_original: Beyoncé-approved: How Hiatus Kayote earned 15 years of A-list respect

items.raw_excerpt: Mountain bike enthusiasts have been working for years on an ambitious 485-mile, multi-use trail called The Velomont that will span the length of the state. They're making sure it's friendly for people people with disabilities, particularly cyclists.
items.summary_en: Mountain bike enthusiasts are building a 485-mile trail called The Velomont across Vermont. They are making sure it is friendly for people with disabilities, especially cyclists.
items.summary_ko: 산악자전거 애호가들이 버몬트주를 가로질러 485마일 길이의 '벨로몬트' 트레일을 조성 중이다. 장애인, 특히 자전거 이용자도 쉽게 이용할 수 있도록 설계하고 있다.
items.title_en: Mountain Bike Enthusiasts Build Accessible Trail Across Vermont
items.title_ko: 장애인도 이용할 수 있는 초장거리 산악자전거 트레일 버몬트에 생긴다
items.title_original: OUTDOOR ACCESS FOR DISABLED IN VERMONT

items.raw_excerpt: Water problems in Guadalajara will require an extensive financial investment to fix, authorities say, although World Cup economic boosts help.
items.summary_en: Authorities say fixing Guadalajara's water problems needs a large financial investment. The World Cup is expected to help boost the local economy.
items.summary_ko: 당국은 과달라하라의 상수도 문제를 해결하려면 대규모 재정 투자가 필요하다고 밝혔다. 월드컵 경제 활성화 효과가 재원 마련에 도움이 될 전망이다.
items.title_en: Multi-year plan to fix water problems in Guadalajara
items.title_ko: 과달라하라 상수도 문제 해결 위한 다년 계획 발표
items.title_original: MND Local: Multi-year plan announced to fix water problems in Guadalajara, plus a World Cup economic boost

items.raw_excerpt: The owner of a resort in B.C.'s Fraser Canyon says part of his business has burned to the ground as a group of wildfires grows to nearly 200 square kilometres.
items.summary_en: A wildfire in British Columbia's Fraser Canyon has grown to nearly 200 square kilometers. The resort owner says part of his business has burned to the ground with wreckage everywhere.
items.summary_ko: 브리티시컬럼비아주 프레이저 캐년에서 발생한 산불이 거의 200제곱킬로미터로 확산됐다. 리조트 업주는 자신의 사업장 일부가 완전히 불탔다고 말했다.
items.title_en: B.C. wildfire destroys resort owner's cabins and trailers
items.title_ko: BC주 산불, 리조트 업주의 오두막과 트레일러 전소
items.title_original: 'There's wreckage everywhere': Resort owner loses cabins, trailers in growing B.C. wildfires

items.raw_excerpt: O Mirante do Paço volta a ser palco de uma maratona de shows neste sábado, 11 de julho, com mais uma edição do Festival Ginga Recife, trazendo Sheldon, Kevin O Chris, WIU e mais.
items.summary_en: Festival Ginga Recife returns to Mirante do Paço with a marathon of live shows this Saturday. The lineup includes Sheldon, Kevin O Chris, WIU, and more artists.
items.summary_ko: 페스티발 진가 레시페가 이번 토요일 미란테 두 파수에서 다시 한번 라이브 쇼 마라톤을 선보입니다. 셀던, 케빈 O 크리스, WIU 등 다양한 아티스트가 무대에 오릅니다.
items.title_en: Festival Ginga Recife Brings Live Music to Mirante do Paço
items.title_ko: 페스티발 진가 레시페, 미란테 두 파수에서 라이브 음악 축제 개최
items.title_original: Festival Ginga Recife recebe Sheldon, Kevin O Chris, WIU e mais; veja programação completa - Terra

items.raw_excerpt: Former US Olympic canoeist David Hearn faces up to 10 years in prison if convicted of allegedly damaging Washington's Reflecting Pool.
items.summary_en: Former US Olympic canoeist David Hearn faces up to 10 years in prison for allegedly damaging Washington's Reflecting Pool. He has pleaded not guilty to the charges.
items.summary_ko: 전직 미국 올림픽 카누 선수 데이비드 헌이 워싱턴 D.C. 리플렉팅 풀을 손상한 혐의로 최대 10년 징역형에 처해질 수 있다. 그는 혐의를 부인하며 무죄를 주장했다.
items.title_en: US Olympian accused of vandalising Reflecting Pool pleads not guilty
items.title_ko: 미국 올림픽 출전 카누 선수, 워싱턴 리플렉팅 풀 손괴 혐의 부인
items.title_original: US Olympian accused of vandalising Reflecting Pool pleads not guilty

items.raw_excerpt: A delicious summer tradition is back to fire up the grills in Ontario’s most beautiful village. Here’s what to know about Elora’s Longest BBQ.
items.summary_en: Elora's Longest BBQ returns to fill the main street and bridge with grills and food. The summer tradition makes Ontario's most beautiful village a delicious place to visit.
items.summary_ko: 온타리오에서 가장 아름다운 마을로 꼽히는 엘로라의 여름 전통 축제 '가장 긴 바비큐'가 돌아온다. 마을 메인 스트리트와 다리가 그릴 향 가득한 맛있는 장소로 변신한다.
items.title_en: Elora village brings back its Longest BBQ summer tradition in Ontario
items.title_ko: 온타리오에서 가장 아름다운 마을 엘로라, '가장 긴 바비큐' 축제 돌아온다
items.title_original: Ontario’s most beautiful village is turning a main street and picturesque bridge into the most delicious place in Canada - The Spec

items.raw_excerpt: The fight to claim a 3.5-tonne space rock didn't just kickstart a publicity battle that divided an empire — it also left a gaping hole in culture. Centuries on, the question remains: Who owned it?
items.summary_en: The Cranbourne meteorite was discovered in Australia but ended up in a museum gift shop in the UK. For centuries, people have argued who truly owned it.
items.summary_ko: 크랜본 운석은 호주에서 발견된 3.5톤짜리 우주 암석이지만 현재 영국 박물관 기념품 가게에 자리하고 있다. 수세기 동안 누가 진정한 소유자인지 논쟁이 이어져 왔다.
items.title_en: A 3.5-tonne meteorite found in Australia now sits in a UK gift shop
items.title_ko: 호주에서 발견된 3.5t 운석, 영국 기념품 가게에 전시된 사연
items.title_original: Why one of our greatest scientific discoveries is in a UK gift shop

items.raw_excerpt: A delicious summer tradition is back to fire up the grills in Ontario’s most beautiful village. Here’s what to know about Elora’s Longest BBQ.
items.summary_en: Elora's main street and its picturesque bridge will host the longest BBQ in Ontario. This summer tradition fires up grills in the village known as Ontario's most beautiful village.
items.summary_ko: 엘로라의 메인 스트리트와 그림 같은 다리가 온타리오 최장 BBQ 축제의 장소가 된다. 이 여름 전통 축제는 온타리오에서 가장 아름다운 마을로 불리는 엘로라에 다시 불판을 지핀다.
items.title_en: Elora's longest BBQ returns to Ontario's most beautiful village
items.title_ko: 온타리오에서 가장 아름다운 마을 엘로라의 Longest BBQ가 돌아온다
items.title_original: Ontario’s most beautiful village is turning a main street and picturesque bridge into the most delicious place in Canada - Brampton Guardian

items.raw_excerpt: Four Bengali migrants return home after a year-long legal struggle in Bangladesh, aided by the Indian judiciary's intervention.
items.summary_en: Four Indian nationals from Bengal were pushed into Bangladesh illegally. After a year-long legal battle, the Indian judiciary intervened. They have now returned safely to their home in Bengal.
items.summary_ko: 방글라데시로 불법으로 밀려났던 벵갈 출신 인도인 4명이 1년간의 법정 투쟁 끝에 인도 사법부의 개입으로 무사히 고국으로 돌아왔습니다.
items.title_en: Four Bengali Migrants Return Home After Year in Bangladesh
items.title_ko: 방글라데시로 밀려났던 벵갈 출신 인도인 4명, 1년 만에 귀국
items.title_original: Four Indian nationals pushed into Bangladesh return home after one-year legal battle

items.raw_excerpt: Sixteen buildings are up for lease in a "rare" opportunity to shape the future of a tiny community of 110 people on the NSW Central Tablelands.
items.summary_en: Sixteen buildings in Hill End, a tiny village of 110 people on the NSW Central Tablelands, are available for lease. The buildings include a former morgue, pub, and mine. Officials hope the opportunity will bring new life to the historic gold mining community.
items.summary_ko: NSW 중앙 고원에 위치한 인구 110명의 작은 마을 힐엔드에서 건물 16동이 임대된다. 건물에는 옛 Morgue, 술집, 광산이 포함된다. 관계자들은 이번 기회로 역사적인 금광 마을에 새로운 활기가 깃들기를 바라고 있다.
items.title_en: Historic mining village offers 16 buildings for lease
items.title_ko: 호주 시골 마을, 건물 16동 임대 기회
items.title_original: Morgue, pub and mine for lease as village ponders return to golden days

items.raw_excerpt: Sargassum has long been a seasonal distraction for those like writer Bel Woodhouse who live in Cozumel. But each year now there's more of it.
items.summary_en: Sargassum has always been a seasonal problem for people living in Cozumel. But now the seaweed keeps getting worse every year, changing life on the island.
items.summary_ko: 사르가섬 해조류는 코수멜 주민들에게 늘 계절 성가신 존재였다. 하지만 해마다 그 양이 늘어나면서 섬의 일상이 바뀌고 있다.
items.title_en: Sargassum seaweed is taking over beaches in Cozumel
items.title_ko: 코수멜 해변을 뒤덮는 사르가섬 해조류
items.title_original: How sargassum is changing the face of paradise in Cozumel

items.raw_excerpt: The Singapore restaurant’s new menu draws on wild kangaroo, coral trout, native botanicals and bush foods as Wilson reconnects with the ingredients of his home country.
items.summary_en: The Singapore restaurant Marguerite has launched a new menu featuring wild kangaroo, coral trout, and native Australian botanicals. Chef Michael Wilson uses these ingredients to reconnect with the food of his home country.
items.summary_ko: 싱가포르 레스토랑 마거리트가 캥거루, 산호 송어, 호주 토종 식물을 활용한 새 메뉴를 선보였다. 셰프 마이클 윌슨은 이 재료를 통해 고국 호주의 맛을 재발견한다.
items.title_en: Chef Michael Wilson puts Australian produce at center of Michelin-starred Marguerite menu
items.title_ko: 미슐랭 스타 마거리트, 셰프 마이클 윌슨의 호주 식재료 메뉴
items.title_original: At Michelin-starred Marguerite, chef Michael Wilson is putting Australian produce centre stage

items.raw_excerpt: Bloomfield in Canada's Prince Edward County is a tiny storybook village packed with unique art shops, boutiques, cozy cafés, and gorgeous nature all around.
items.summary_en: Bloomfield in Canada's Prince Edward County is a tiny storybook village. It has unique art shops, boutiques, and cozy cafes. The village is surrounded by gorgeous nature and is perfect for a relaxing getaway.
items.summary_ko: 블룸필드는 캐나다 프린스에드워드카운티에 위치한 작은 동화 같은 마을입니다. 독특한 예술 상점, 부티크, 아늑한 카페가 있습니다. 마을은 아름다운 자연으로 둘러싸여 있어 휴가를 보내기에 완벽합니다.
items.title_en: Bloomfield Village In Canada Is A Charming Walkable Escape
items.title_ko: 캐나다 블룸필드 마을은 매력적인 도보 여행지
items.title_original: Canada's Underrated Lake Ontario Village Is A Charming And Walkable Escape With Shops, Tasty Eats, And Art - islands.com

items.raw_excerpt: Takito Oda of Japan, left, and Takuya Miki of Japan shake hands at the end of their second round men's wheelchair singles match at the Wimbledon Tennis Championships in London on Thursday. Oda won the match.
items.summary_en: Takito Oda defeated Takuya Miki in the second round of men's wheelchair singles at Wimbledon in London. It was an all-Japanese match at the famous tennis tournament.
items.summary_ko: 오다 타키토가 미키 타쿠야를 꺾고 윔블던 남자 휠체어 단식 2회전에서 승리했습니다. 세계적인 테니스 대회인 윔블던에서 일본 선수들 간의 경기가 펼쳐졌습니다.
items.title_en: Japanese players face off in Wimbledon wheelchair singles
items.title_ko: 윔블던 휠체어 단식, 일본 선수끼리 맞대결
items.title_original: Wimbledon wheelchair singles

items.raw_excerpt: A historic portrait of French explorer Samuel de Champlain has found a new home at the Samuel de Champlain History Center in Champlain, New York.
items.summary_en: A historic portrait of French explorer Samuel de Champlain has arrived at the Samuel de Champlain History Center in Champlain, New York. The local museum now houses the important artwork. Visitors can view the portrait at its new location.
items.summary_ko: 프랑스 탐험가 사뮈엘 드 샹플랭의 역사적 초상화가 뉴욕주 샹플랭에 위치한 샹플랭 역사 센터에 도착했습니다. 지역 박물관이 중요한 작품을 소장하게 되었습니다. 방문객들은 새로운 위치에서 초상화를 감상할 수 있습니다.
items.title_en: Historic portrait of Samuel de Champlain finds new home at local museum
items.title_ko: 사뮈엘 드 샹플랭의 역사적 초상화, 지역 박물관에 새로운 보금자리
items.title_original: Historic Samuel de Champlain portrait finds new home at local museum - WCAX

items.raw_excerpt: Voters in Bankipur predict a tight race between BJP and JSP founder Prashant Kishor in the upcoming byelection.
items.summary_en: Voters in Bankipur predict a tight race between BJP and JSP founder Prashant Kishor in the upcoming byelection. The contest is seen as a direct fight between the two parties in this Bihar constituency.
items.summary_ko: 방키푸르 지역 유권자들은 upcoming 보궐선거에서 BJP와 JSP 창립자 프라샨트 키슈르 간의 치열한 경쟁을 예상하고 있다. 이번 선거는 비하르 지역에서 두 정당 간의 직접적인 대결로 보고 있다.
items.title_en: Bankipur bypoll: voters say the battle will be between BJP and JSP
items.title_ko: 방키푸르 보궐선거: 유권자들, BJP와 JSP 간 접전 예상
items.title_original: Bankipur bypoll: voters say the battle will be between BJP and JSP
